curation.synopsis: On the world of Gathis, the Doom Eagles honour their dead and then forget them, for their creed begins with the words 'we are already dead.' So what is to be done when one of the fallen returns? Veteran Sergeant Tarikus was thought lost when the ship carrying him was destroyed, but he was taken alive, sold to the Red Corsairs and delivered into the hands of the monstrous Fabius Bile, who tortured and remade him before he finally escaped. Now home at last, Tarikus finds no welcome, only suspicion. Set to watch him for any trace of corruption, his battle-brothers must decide whether the warrior who came back is still one of their own, or something that should never have returned.

flags.reason: Roster lists format=novel, but sources show this is a short story from the Legends of the Space Marines anthology (2010), re-released as a standalone ebook in 2016.
